programmes.show_description: As Kasia takes on her first assignment as an agent, Rajib's military values are tested. Meanwhile, a familiar face comes to David's aid.
Judge Rinder rules the courtroom in his hit series, but now the respected barrister with a criminal defence background steps out from behind the bench to take on real cases.

Members of the local constabulary patrol the town of Ashfordly and the nearby village of Aidensfield, keeping the peace whilst also dealing with local loveable rogues.
Cassie invites her friends on a trip to Chicago to help them reconnect; Sam is called in to assist on a surgery.
From the planets most stunning state of the art structures to its mightiest modern machines, none would have been possible without the pioneering engineers of the past.
Set sail with comedian, presenter and Masterchef winner Judi Love as she cruises around the Mediterranean, visiting fabulous locations and cooking up local dishes along the way.
From monstrous sharks to killer catfish, his investigations are as varied and challenging as ever. Jeremy travels the world to uncover a range of underwater assassins.
Matron is forced to change her plans after a tragic turn of events, Harper's money-saving schemes cause problems and Jill and Gordon have a disagreement. (SL)
George and Greengrass disturb an intruder in the Aidensfield Arms. Nick finds himself taken hostage when he goes to investigate lights on after closing time.
Gillian adopts three baby hedgehogs and hand feeds them until they can fend for themselves. Helen has to respond to a call from her boss's husband about a difficult calving.
Award-winning hotelier Alex Polizzi continues her quest to turn the UK's hotels of horror into relaxing retreats.

A corpse is dragged out of a river, but a driving licence found on the body belongs to a person who has no connection with the dead man.
Opening medals night in Torun: women's 3000m, men's shot put, blistering 60m semis and heptathlon rolls on.
A tragic story about an outbreak of foot and mouth disease in a remote farm. Reg Manston has built up his pedigree herd through years of work and now has to face losing it all.
Kirsten closes in on the killer, but their capture reveals the grave threat that Vigil faces. On the submarine, Amy makes a terrifying discovery.
Daniel asks Megan about the future of their relationship. Meanwhile Theo hatches a new plan, announcing that he's been offered a job in Belfast before spiking Todd's drink.

Prime Suspect 6, sees Tennison's single minded determination to get justice for murder victims at all costs conflicting sharply with the politics of her high ranking position.
Resolving to clear her husband's name, Dani tries to uncover the truth of Zak's death as her marriage deteriorates further.

programmes.show_name: Paul O'Grady: For The Love Of Dogs
programmes.show_description: With exclusive access, Paul O'Grady follows the ups and downs of life at Battersea Dogs and Cats Home as its dedicated staff care for our four-legged friends in need.
The unexplained poisoning of a former detective sergeant leads Endeavour and Thursday to a local cinema.
Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell present the heartwarming series which aims to reunite people desperate to find their long lost relatives after years of separation.
In this gripping series finale, the crew spot the iceberg and take evasive action, but too late to prevent a collision. Panic takes hold.

programmes.show_name: The Secret Life Of Our Pets
programmes.show_description: In this series we reveal the extraordinary secret superpowers of our pets, honed in the wild and brilliantly adapted for life in the pampered heart of the family.
Alex Polizzi, hospitality expert is embarking on a new venture of her own, in partnership with her hotelier and interior designer mother, Olga.
Starring John Simm as DS Roy Grace, these new feature-length films will see the tenacious detective doggedly pursuing the truth behind more of Brighton's most complex cases.
A young woman's troubled past comes back to haunt her when she suspects her new husband is trying to kill her.
